name: Duration.Days
signature: Duration.Days(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number

name: Duration.From
signature: Duration.From(value as any) as nullable duration
description: Returns a duration value from the given value. * `value`: The value from which the duration is derived. If the given `value` is `null`, this function returns `null`. If the given `value` is a `duration`, `value` is returned. Values of the following types can be converted to a `duration` value: * `text`: A `duration` value from textual elapsed time forms (d.h:m:s). Refer to [`Duration.FromText`](duration-fromtext.md) for details. * `number`: A `duration` equivalent to the number of whole and fractional days expressed by `value`. If `value` is of any other type, an error is returned.

name: Duration.FromText
signature: Duration.FromText(text as nullable text) as nullable duration
description: Returns a duration value from the specified text, `text`. The following formats can be parsed by this function: * (-)hh:mm(:ss(.ff)) * (-)ddd(.hh:mm(:ss(.ff))) (All ranges are inclusive) * ddd: Number of days. * hh: Number of hours, between 0 and 23. * mm: Number of minutes, between 0 and 59. * ss: Number of seconds, between 0 and 59. * ff: Fraction of seconds, between 0 and 9999999.

name: Duration.Hours
signature: Duration.Hours(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number

name: Duration.Minutes
signature: Duration.Minutes(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number

name: Duration.Seconds
signature: Duration.Seconds(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number

name: Duration.ToRecord
description: Returns a record containing the parts the duration value, `duration`. * `duration`: A `duration` from which the record is created.

name: Duration.ToText
signature: Duration.ToText(duration as nullable duration, optional format as nullable text) as nullable text
description: Returns a textual representation in the form "day.hour:mins:sec" of the given duration value, `duration`. * `duration`: A `duration` from which the textual representation is calculated. * `format`: *(Optional)* Deprecated, will raise an error if not null.

name: Duration.TotalDays
signature: Duration.TotalDays(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number
description: Returns the total days spanned by `duration`.

name: Duration.TotalHours
signature: Duration.TotalHours(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number
description: Returns the total hours spanned by `duration`.

name: Duration.TotalMinutes
signature: Duration.TotalMinutes(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number
description: Returns the total minutes spanned by `duration`.

name: Duration.TotalSeconds
signature: Duration.TotalSeconds(duration as nullable duration) as nullable number
description: Returns the total seconds spanned by `duration`.
